sub_modules.fp_unpack: Extracts sign, exponent, fraction, effective exponent, hidden-bit significand, and operand classification flags.
sub_modules.fp_special_cases: Handles NaN, infinity, and zero special cases, including invalid-operation and signed-zero behavior by rounding mode.
sub_modules.fp_align_add_norm: Aligns significands, performs signed-magnitude addition or subtraction, detects cancellation, and normalizes the unrounded result with guard/round/sticky bits.
sub_modules.fp_round_pack: Applies the selected rounding mode, detects overflow/underflow conditions required by the tests, and packs the final floating-point result.
